signal.title: Heavy AI users report mental burnout from  babysitting  models
signal.reason: Highly relevant. This headline signals a critical human-factor bottleneck in AI adoption and productivity. For investors and technologists, it points to significant challenges in workforce integration, potential impacts on ROI for AI investments, and immense opportunities for startups developing more autonomous agents, better user interfaces, and tools to manage human-AI interaction friction. It directly impacts executive strategy, workforce planning, and ultimately earnings.

signal.title: Is using AI for therapy safe ? Study raises concerns
signal.reason: Highly relevant for identifying emerging risks, regulatory hurdles, and investment implications for AI models in a sensitive application area (therapy), directly impacting startups, funding, and public acceptance.

signal.title: Nvidia Jensen Huang says  weve achieved AGI . But no one can agree on what that means
signal.reason: Highlights executive commentary on AGI while immediately contextualizing it with the critical ongoing debate about its definition, offering a nuanced signal for market understanding.

signal.title: Africa : AI - Driven Border Surveillance Is Spreading Across West Africa . What This Means for Migrant Rights
signal.reason: Highlights real-world AI deployment and market expansion in a specific region and vertical, providing valuable insight into adoption trends, market opportunities, and potential ESG considerations for AI tech. While the focus on migrant rights isn't a direct financial metric, it addresses critical ethical and regulatory risks sophisticated investors monitor.

tldr: AI's "AGI" claims clash with user burnout and rising safety concerns.
US bonds rally on aggressive bets for imminent Fed rate cuts.
US expands threats on Iran's energy/water amid diplomatic talks.
